name: accounting firms processing 10–20 payroll entries/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payroll entries/month, manual formatting causes delayed payments. We convert raw timesheet entries into formatted payroll input files instead of manual formatting of timesheet entries.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll input files lead to delayed payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payroll input files lead to delayed payments.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payroll entries/month, manual formatting causes delayed payments. We convert raw timesheet entries into formatted payroll input files instead of manual formatting of timesheet entries.
